deploy.startCommand: export DB_CONNECTION=sqlite; export DB_DATABASE=database/database.sqlite; export DB_DATABASE_RUNTIME=database/database.sqlite; mkdir -p database; touch database/database.sqlite; php artisan optimize:clear || true; php artisan config:clear || true; php artisan route:clear || true; php artisan view:clear || true; php artisan cache:clear || true; php artisan migrate --force; php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=${PORT:-8000}
